attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SR_SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SR_RECEIPT_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SOURCE_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.VENDOR_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.VENDOR_SITE_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SECONDARY_INVENTORY, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SOURCE_TYPE, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ALLOCATION_PERCENT, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.RANK1, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.OLD_RANK, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SHIP_METHOD, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG,
 (
 select SR_SOURCE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG
 minus
 select SR_SOURCE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SR_SOURCE_ID = STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.SR_SOURCE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MRP_SR_SOURCE_ORG.REFRESH_DATETIME
